Container.Name: broccoli_ai-trading-agent
Container.Overview: Nocturne — AI trading agent for Hyperliquid. Uses an LLM (via OpenRouter) to analyse real-time TAAPI technical indicators and make buy/sell/hold decisions in a continuous loop with take-profit and stop-loss orders. Requires TAAPI_API_KEY, HYPERLIQUID_PRIVATE_KEY, OPENROUTER_API_KEY, ASSETS, and INTERVAL. API on port 3000: GET /diary (trade decisions), GET /logs (log tail). Use HYPERLIQUID_NETWORK=testnet to validate before live trading. If the GHCR image is not yet published, build locally: git clone https://github.com/Gajesh2007/ai-trading-agent && docker build --platform linux/amd64 -t ghcr.io/gajesh2007/ai-trading-agent:latest .

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: Container Port: 3000 — minimal HTTP API. GET /diary returns recent trade decisions as JSON; GET /logs?path=llm_requests.log tails log files. Keep this port within your trusted network only.

Config.Name: TAAPI API Key
Config.Description: Required. API key from https://taapi.io — used to fetch technical indicators (RSI, EMA, etc.) for trade decisions.

Config.Name: Hyperliquid Private Key
Config.Description: Required. Ethereum-compatible private key (0x-prefixed) for your Hyperliquid trading wallet. Generate a dedicated wallet for this bot and NEVER share this key.

Config.Name: OpenRouter API Key
Config.Description: Required. API key from https://openrouter.ai — used to call LLM models for trading decisions.

Config.Name: Assets
Config.Description: Required. Space- or comma-separated list of assets to trade (e.g. BTC ETH SOL). Only perpetuals available on Hyperliquid are supported.

Config.Name: Interval
Config.Description: Required. Trading loop interval — how often the agent runs its analysis cycle. Examples: 5m (5 minutes), 1h (1 hour), 1d (1 day).

Config.Name: LLM Model
Config.Description: OpenRouter model name used for trading decisions. See https://openrouter.ai/models for the full list. Examples: x-ai/grok-4, anthropic/claude-opus-4.

Config.Name: Hyperliquid Network
Config.Description: Hyperliquid network to use. Set to testnet while validating your configuration; switch to mainnet for live trading.

Config.Name: OpenRouter Base URL
Config.Description: Optional. Override only if using a self-hosted or custom OpenRouter-compatible endpoint.

Config.Name: OpenRouter Referer
Config.Description: Optional. HTTP Referer header sent to OpenRouter for request attribution (e.g. https://your-site.com).

Config.Name: OpenRouter App Title
Config.Description: Optional. App title sent to OpenRouter for attribution in your OpenRouter usage dashboard.

Config.Name: Reasoning Enabled
Config.Description: Set to true to enable LLM reasoning tokens (extended chain-of-thought). May improve decision quality but increases latency and API cost.

Config.Name: Reasoning Effort
Config.Description: Reasoning effort level when REASONING_ENABLED=true. Options: low, medium, high.

Config.Name: API Host
Config.Description: Bind address for the internal API server. Leave as 0.0.0.0 to accept connections on all interfaces inside the container.
